inputs.label: Weight Value
inputs.businessContext: The numeric value of the weight to be converted. Based on SI unit system (kg).

inputs.label: From Unit
inputs.businessContext: The unit of the input weight. Supports metric (kg, g, mg, t) and imperial (lb, oz, st, ton_us, ton_uk) units. Based on international standard unit conversions.

inputs.label: To Unit
inputs.businessContext: The target unit for conversion. Same set as fromUnit.

inputs.label: Decimal Precision
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for the result. Common engineering practice: 2-4 digits.

rules: precision must be integer between 0 and 10
fromUnit and toUnit must be valid units from the list

thresholds.weightValue: If weightValue > 1000000, warn 'Large weight value; consider using tonnes.'

formulas.conversionFactor: const conversionFactors = { 'kg': 1, 'g': 0.001, 'mg': 1e-6, 't': 1000, 'lb': 0.45359237, 'oz': 0.028349523125, 'st': 6.35029318, 'ton_us': 907.18474, 'ton_uk': 1016.0469088 }; const result = (weightValue * conversionFactors[fromUnit]) / conversionFactors[toUnit]; const roundedResult = Math.round(result * Math.pow(10, precision)) / Math.pow(10, precision);

hiddenLossDrivers: If weightValue > 1000000: 'Large weight value; consider using tonnes.'
suggestedActions: Verify unit selection to avoid conversion errors.
For large weights, use tonnes (t) for readability.
